title: Soar!
description: A minecarft modpack that lets you soar through the skys!
body:
# Soar!
Have you ever wanted to fly around in your minecraft world and chill, Welll here's the modpack for you, Introducing Soar! Soar is a modpack that makes flying with an elytra in minecraft so much more fun, on top of this theres better world generation to make the view amazing!

**WARNGING** This modpack is not made for 
survival gameplay
